75136.subject: Chainlink lines up 50+ banks for onchain FX settlement
75136.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-securities-probe-mstr-two-year-low-strc-below-par)**['s STRC slides as a securities investigation lands](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-securities-probe-mstr-two-year-low-strc-below-par)

* **[Chainlink](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/chainlink-project-pangea-50-banks-16-countries-t0-fx-settlement)**[ lines up 50+ banks for onchain FX settlement](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/chainlink-project-pangea-50-banks-16-countries-t0-fx-settlement)

* **[Ripple](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-rlusd-japan-jfsa-sbi-vc-trade-circle-nomura-stablecoin)**['s RLUSD goes live in Japan ](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-rlusd-japan-jfsa-sbi-vc-trade-circle-nomura-stablecoin)

* **[Tokenized RWA value](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/tokenized-asset-value-stalls-even-as-stock-token-holders-surge)**[ stalls even as stock-token holders surge](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/tokenized-asset-value-stalls-even-as-stock-token-holders-surge)

* **[Kalshi](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kalshi-seeks-40b-valuation-seven-weeks-after-22b-raise)**['s funding talks hit a $40B valuation](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kalshi-seeks-40b-valuation-seven-weeks-after-22b-raise)

**Strategy**'s troubles turned legal. The [Rosen Law Firm opened a securities investigation](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-securities-probe-mstr-two-year-low-strc-below-par) and began soliciting shareholders for a potential class action, as **MSTR** hit a **two-year low below $100** and its **STRC** preferred traded about **26% below par**. Three company officials [posted coordinated reassurances about the balance sheet](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/strategy-executives-issue-coordinated-investor-reassurances-as-strc-hits-record-lows) within hours, with bitcoin near **$59,600**.

At the other end of the market, the buildout accelerated. **Chainlink** and a consortium of **more than 50 banks across 16 countries** [launched Project Pangea for real-time FX settlement](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/chainlink-project-pangea-50-banks-16-countries-t0-fx-settlement) on the $9.6 trillion-a-day currency market. **Ripple**'s [RLUSD went live in Japan](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-rlusd-japan-jfsa-sbi-vc-trade-circle-nomura-stablecoin) as the first foreign stablecoin cleared under the country's payment law, while **Kalshi** [drew talks at a $40 billion valuation](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kalshi-seeks-40b-valuation-seven-weeks-after-22b-raise), double its raise seven weeks ago. The caveat came from the data: tokenized real-world asset value [slipped to about $31.5 billion even as holders rose 14%](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/tokenized-asset-value-stalls-even-as-stock-token-holders-surge), the first monthly decline of the institutional r

75131.subject: Russia Hacked A Dissident’s iPhone With Banned Israeli Tech, Records Show
75131.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/russia-hacked-dissidents-iphone-banned-israeli-tech-records-vnigc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BJ3PNbzruR6au3rpgIZ15og%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0Q4d2ht-P0kck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqvfpphe~ng-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqvfpphe-ng
  
Good evening, In 2021, Israeli police tech provider Cellebrite announced that it would no longer sell its hacking technology to Russia. However, within months of the ban being enacted, Moscow investigators reportedly used the tech to search the iPhone of Russian opposition politician Andrey Pivovarov. Cellebrite has been widely criticized for previously selling its technology to regimes with poor human rights records. Here’s what we know. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Nathan Posner/Anadolu via Getty Images OpenAI Rolls Out Powerful GPT-5.6 Models To Limited Users Vetted By U.S. Government The advanced technology is only available to select “trusted partners” for now. Getty Images Illinois Man Sues DraftKings For Allegedly Fueling Gambling Addiction The man alleges the betting firm caused him to lose his job and drain more than $2 million in assets, including his wedding fund.

75130.subject: 🟪 Friday Charts
75130.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

“==Let's keep a sense of crisis.”==
_— SK Hynix CEO Kwak Noh-jung_



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/69fdc6e0-c728-445d-a96b-df412fa60cd4/image.png?t=1782506105)
Caption: 

# Friday charts: Gods of memory

SK Hynix, the South Korean maker of DRAM memory chips, allocates a generous 10% of its operating profits to its bonus pool. 

With business booming, that’s [estimated](https://www.koreajoongangdaily.com/opinion/debate-grows-over-semiconductor-bonuses/12560475) to work out to an average bonus of about _$477,000_ for each of its 34,500 employees. Barring sudden setbacks, next year’s bonus could be close to $1 million.

SK Hynix pays bonuses in cash, not shares.

This will reshape South Korea’s finances. In each of the next few years, SK Hynix is [likely](https://en.fnnews.com/news/202604091540595859) to pay at least $30 billion in corporate taxes. South Korea’s national debt is only $900 billion.

It’s reshaping the social scene in Korea, too.

Matchmakers [say](https://www.reuters.com/world/asia-pacific/south-korea-job-or-partner-samsung-sk-hynix-is-new-a-catch-2026-06-23/) employees at SK Hynix have risen to the top of the dating pool. A vest with the company logo has become “the ultimate blind date outfit” and Korea’s “hottest status symbol.” An SNL skit [labeled](https://biz.chosun.com/en/en-society/2026/04/29/LFK5GO34ABAFNNQG2AV5DPFBRA/) the company’s employees “Hynix gods.”

This is an unexpected turn of events.

DRAM is a commodity product typically mired in a state of severe oversupply: it’s the most cyclical part of the famously cyclical semiconductor industry. This has made it a terrible business to be in for most of history.

In 2001, Hynix had to be rescued from the brink of bankruptcy by its creditor banks. Several attempts to sell the company subsequently failed before SK Group finally bought it at a distressed price in 2012. As recently as 2023, the company posted a loss of 7.7 trillion won.

Things couldn’t look much more different today. The company’s expected to make a profit of as much as 80 trillion won this year. Next year should be even better.

Probably the year after that, too, because DRAM is suddenly one of the scarcest resources in the AI e

This week’s highlights: Securitize NYSE listing timeline; Continental partners with Securitize; Securitize to Tokenize Atlas America Fund into USAFi; Tokenization tops $51B; and KDDI and Securitize Japan explore next-generation financial services. Securitize and Cantor Equity Partners II Combination Expected to Raise ~$400M and Trade on NYSE July 2 | Securitize Securitize’s proposed business combination with Cantor Equity Partners II moves closer to completion, with expected proceeds and NYSE timing under ticker SECZ now outlined. READ MORE Continental Partners With Securitize for Digital Securities | Crypto News With a 20-year track record as the gold standard in SPAC processing, Continental’s partnership with Securitize helps bring tokenization capabilities to a broader segment of the market. READ MORE Crypto Critic Nouriel Roubini Partners With Securitize to Launch Tokenized Atlas America Fund | Crypto Briefing The planned launch brings together Atlas Capital Team and Securitize’s tokenization platform to link an SEC-registered ETF to Dubai’s VARA framework as tokenized RWA collateral. READ MORE Tokenized RWA Market Cap Rises 40% to Top $51B as Industry Races to Define Equity Tokenization Model: Bernstein | The Block Tokenized RWAs have crossed $51 billion in market cap, up 40% year-to-date, even as the broader crypto market has lost roughly a fifth of its value over the same period, according to Bernstein. READ MORE KDDI and Securitize Japan Explore Next-Generation Financial Services Leveraging Blockchain  | Securitize As KDDI expands its next-generation financial services strategy, it will work with Securitize Japan to explore RWA tokenization use cases across telecom and financial services.
